title: Chris L. Barker
text:
Chris Barker is an Assistant Professor of Economics and Finance at the Carter College of Business at Harding University. He received his undergraduate degree in Accounting from Harding in 1993.
Chris completed his graduate work at Middle Tennessee State University (MTSU) earning a Master’s degree in History in 2009, a Master’s in Business Administration in 2016, and finally, in 2025, a Ph.D. in Economics. While completing his doctorate, he was a Research Fellow with the Political Economy Research Institute (PERI)
Since 2019, Chris has been a faculty member at Harding University teaching in the Carter College of Business. His research interests are in Public Choice Economics, Education, Health, Political Science, and Sports.
